context: Agent correctly distinguishes CRD usage from native Kubernetes resources, describes the mandatory documentation lookup workflow, and flags known missing fields.

checklist.name: CRD correctly identified
checklist.description: Agent identifies the Certificate resource (cert-manager.io/v1) as a CRD and the Deployment as a native Kubernetes resource.

checklist.name: Documentation lookup process described
checklist.description: Agent describes using context7 MCP (mcp__context7__resolve-library-id then mcp__context7__get-library-docs) as the preferred approach, with WebSearch as the stated fallback.

checklist.name: Correct context7 query parameters stated
checklist.description: Agent mentions resolving the library ID with a query like 'cert-manager' and fetching docs with a topic such as 'Certificate spec'.

checklist.name: Missing or optional fields identified
checklist.description: Agent identifies at least one field that is commonly required or strongly recommended for cert-manager Certificates (e.g., duration, renewBefore, or usages) that is absent from the provided spec.

checklist.name: kubeconform schema gap explained
checklist.description: Agent explains that kubeconform will report 'No schema found' for CRDs because they are not in the default Kubernetes schema and that the CRDs-catalog or manual validation via Stage 6 docs is required.
